{{Quote|I can feel Shadowmen everywhere...crawling all over the planet.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="Blind Force">{{CWACite|1|Blind Force}}</ref>}}
The '''Shadowmen''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] native to the "night [[Planet/Legends|planet]]" of [[Nivek]].

==Biology and appearance==
The average Shadowman was a thin, [[Insectoid/Legends|insectile]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] with purple skin, a small crest on their heads and large, white eyes. Their highly sensitive night vision was part of the [[Species/Legends|species]]' evolution in the pitch-darkness of their natural environment.

==Society and culture==
The Shadowmen were known as skilled [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] and trackers, and protected their property fiercely, using the darkness of their world to ambush enemies. They were high-tech hunters, employing [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blasters]] and [[durasteel cable netting]] to capture foes.

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Shadowmen allied with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], allowing the Separatists to construct a weapons facility on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Roughly four months into the war, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] undertook a [[mission to Nivek]] to destroy the facility, and were attacked by the natives. Though they were unable to physically see their opponents, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to sense the Shadowmen, and were able to complete their mission.
